'''Katorrs''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Adumar system/Legends|Katorrs system]]. After a long night on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] found this particular sun's brightness annoying and asked [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] to shoot it down in his [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]].

{{Star-stub}}
